games.name: Mr Autofire
games.description: Get ready to blast away endless alien hordes in this non-stop retro action shooter! The fabric of reality is in shreds and monsters are pouring in! Become Mr. Autofire and bring your biggest gun and your A game, because you&amp;rsquo;re the&amp;hellip; Defender of Everything! Rampage through levels, unlock new worlds and shoot the alien in the face. Discover new, more powerful weapons and gear. Get faster, nastier and more dodgier with different perks! It&amp;rsquo;s a you vs. everyone else situation, and it would be nasty to be everyone else. What are you waiting for? BITE THE BULLET AND RUMBLE!

Clean the floor immediately to keep the store spotless. You also need to manage the cash register&amp;mdash;don&amp;rsquo;t keep customers waiting too long. Make sure to scan every item&amp;rsquo;s barcode to track how many products leave the store. If the shelves start to empty, use the money you&amp;rsquo;ve earned to restock from the storage room.
games.instructions: Use the WASD keys to move To clean the floor grab a broom from the storage room After sweeping rinse the broom in the water bucket Scan the barcodes of purchased items and place them in the shopping basket Playable on both mobile and PC

Explore magical locations, from the Moonlight Glade to the Slug Trail, and watch incredible creatures appear from small drops of magic potion. Do you want to speed up the process? Start the adventure right now - the familiars are waiting for you!

Intuitive interface: Clear graphics and smooth animation make it easy for players to pick up, while
